rejection_reason: tone: forbidden_phrase_start — email opens with 'I wanted to reach out', one of the most overused openers in B2B sales. It signals a generic template and gives the reader no reason to continue. Replace with a specific observation about the recipient.
text:
Subject: FlowAI for {{company}}

Hi {{first_name}},

I wanted to reach out to introduce FlowAI, a platform that helps busy professionals like you save an average of 2 hours per day through intelligent automation.

I believe FlowAI could be a great fit for {{company}} based on your industry.

I'd love to schedule a 15-minute call to discuss how we might be able to help. Does next week work?
